name: Order Support Assistant — P95 End-to-End Latency
description: Use-case-specific latency target for an interactive chat/mobile/IVR support workflow. Adjust per channel — interactive channels should carry a tighter target than any future batch/async agent use case.

query.note: Latency SLOs in Datadog are typically defined as % of requests under a latency threshold (e.g. % of workflows completing under 4000ms), not a raw percentile target. Example numerator/denominator below.
